title: Die Wanderung an der Causeway Coast im August 2024 war ein unvergessliches Erlebnis!

Die atemberaubende Landschaft, von dramatischen Klippen bis zu wunderschönen Stränden, machte jeden Schritt lohnenswert. Die Route war gut organisiert, und die B&B-Gastgeber waren unglaublich gastfreundlich und freundlich. Alles war perfekt arrangiert, was es zu einem stressfreien und angenehmen Abenteuer machte. Sehr empfehlenswert! (Übersetzt aus dem Englischen)
review_text_en: Hiking the Causeway Coast in August 2024 was an unforgettable experience! The breathtaking scenery, from dramatic cliffs to stunning beaches, made every step worthwhile. The route was well-organised, and the B&B hosts were incredibly welcoming and kind. Everything was perfectly arranged, making it a stress-free and enjoyable adventure. Highly recommend!

title: Im August 2024 haben wir uns - Mutter (64) und Tochter (30) - über TUI bei Cliff angemeldet
content: Im August 2024 haben wir uns - Mutter (64) und Tochter (30) - über TUI bei Cliff von Walking Holiday Ireland für den Wicklow Way angemeldet. Es stellte sich als fantastisches Erlebnis heraus. Es begann mit einem Missgeschick - ich (Mutter) war so unvorsichtig, meinen Reisepass zu Hause zu vergessen. Glücklicherweise fanden wir noch am selben Tag einen späteren Flug und kamen schließlich Stunden später bei unserem ersten B&B an, müder und gestresster als geplant. Wir hatten Cliff in diesen Stunden mehrmals am Telefon. Die ganze Zeit über blieb er freundlich, zeigte großes Einfühlungsvermögen und hielt sowohl den Taxifahrer als auch das B&B informiert, sodass am Ende alles klappte. Er hatte uns bereits vollständig für sich gewonnen. Alles erwies sich als sehr gut organisiert. Alle B&Bs waren angenehm und gut gepflegt. Die Umgebung ist wirklich wunderschön. Wir empfehlen den Wicklow Way mit Cliff von Walking Holiday Ireland von ganzem Herzen! (Übersetzt aus dem Englischen)
constructive_feedback: Navigation markers not always consistent - GPS app on phone essential as a backup.
highlight_staff: Cliff - praised for empathy and responsiveness during passport crisis
review_text_en: In August 2024, we - mother (64) and daughter (30) - signed up through TUI with Cliff from Walking Holiday Ireland for The Wicklow Way. It turned out to be a fantastic experience. It started with a mishap - I (mother) was foolish enough to leave my passport at home. Fortunately, we found a later flight that same day and finally arrived at our first B&B hours later, more tired and stressed than planned. We had Cliff on the phone many times during those hours. Throughout this whole time, he remained friendly, showed great empathy, and kept both the taxi driver and B&B informed, so everything worked out in the end. He had already won us over completely. Everything proved to be very well organised. All B&Bs were pleasant and well-maintained. The surroundings are truly beautiful. We wholeheartedly recommend The Wicklow Way with Cliff from Walking Holiday Ireland!

title: Wat een ongelooflijke ervaring om de Cooley Peninsula te bewandelen!
content: Wat een ongelooflijke ervaring om de Cooley Peninsula te bewandelen! De paden waren perfect gemarkeerd en het uitzicht op de Mourne Mountains was adembenemend. Onze B&B-gastheren waren ongelooflijk gastvrij en het volledige Ierse ontbijt gaf ons genoeg energie voor onze dagelijkse wandelingen. De bagagetransferservice werkte vlekkeloos. We genoten vooral van de rustige paden langs Carlingford Lough. Elke cent waard! (Vertaald uit het Engels)
review_text_en: What an incredible experience hiking the Cooley Peninsula! The trails were perfectly marked and the views of the Mourne Mountains were breathtaking. Our B&B hosts were incredibly welcoming and the full Irish breakfasts gave us plenty of energy for our daily hikes. The luggage transfer service worked flawlessly. We especially loved the tranquil paths along Carlingford Lough. Worth every penny!

title: We enjoyed the Wicklow Way and also the two Barrow Way routes added to our trip
content: We enjoyed the Wicklow Way and also the two Barrow Way routes added to our trip afterwards. It was nice to spend a day walking along the river — a completely different experience. What a pleasure, what views (we were lucky with the weather). The B&Bs were well organised, and the transport from the B&Bs to restaurants was pleasant. It's great that you can customise the trip. The 'rest day' at Glendalough was also great — still walked 15 km! After these well-organised walks, we continued to enjoy the south of Ireland. We still look back with great pleasure on the unforgettable walking days in 2013 on the Cooley and Mourne mountains.

title: Wir sind zurück in den Niederlanden und haben die Wanderungen auf dem Wicklow Way sehr genossen
content: Wir sind zurück in den Niederlanden und haben die Wanderungen auf dem Wicklow Way sehr genossen. Es war oft atemberaubend schön. Wir wurden in allen B&Bs herzlich empfangen, mit schönen Duschen, bequemen Betten und viel Ruhe. Wir hatten eine leichte Vorliebe für eine der Unterkünfte, wo die Gastgeberin besonders freundlich war. Kompliment für die ausgezeichnete Betreuung. Wir haben diesen Urlaub wirklich genossen, auch dank der guten Organisation und der freundlichen Menschen, die uns überall begrüßt haben. Nicht zu vergessen, der wunderbare Fahrer, der wirklich einzigartig ist. Kurz gesagt, es war fantastisch! (Übersetzt aus dem Englischen)
highlight_staff: Airport/transfer driver described as 'one of a kind'
review_text_en: We are back in the Netherlands and thoroughly enjoyed the hikes on the Wicklow Way. It was often breathtakingly beautiful. We were warmly welcomed at all the B&Bs, with nice showers, comfortable beds, and lots of peace and quiet. We had a slight preference for one of the accommodations, where the hostess was especially kind. Compliments for the excellent care. We truly enjoyed this holiday, thanks in part to the good organisation and the friendly people who welcomed us everywhere. Not to forget, the wonderful driver who is truly 'one of a kind.' In short, it was fantastic!

title: Die Wanderungen waren absolut atemberaubend

title: Fortunately, we didn't need your help number during our walking adventure in Nor
content: Fortunately, we didn't need your help number during our walking adventure in Northern Ireland last week, but it felt safe to have your number at hand. We had a marvellous holiday and were very lucky with the weather. The trip was very well organised. The hiking routes were clear, with the elevation profile with coloured track types, and especially the QR codes, so we never got lost. The driver who collected us at the airport and brought us to the starting point of the first two hikes was an entertaining guide, and we were very well cared for in all of the B&Bs. The last one especially was very impressive. All in all: maybe my best holiday ever (and I'm 61!). So a big thank you!

The B&Bs were charming and our hosts provided great local insights. Even with some typical Irish weather, it was an unforgettable experience.

title: Als Paar haben wir einen wunderschönen Wanderurlaub genossen
content: Als Paar haben wir einen wunderschönen Wanderurlaub genossen, organisiert von Cliff Wayenberg von Walking Holiday Ireland. Die sechs Wandertage im Raum Dundalk, Carlingford und den Mourne Mountains waren eine gute Kombination verschiedener Landschaftstypen, von leichtem Wandern bis zu steilen Anstiegen. Die Wanderstrecken wurden jeden Tag etwas länger und schwieriger, was täglich eine schöne Herausforderung bot. B&Bs in Städten mit viel zu sehen und zu tun am Abend, und alle mit sehr begeisterten Gastgebern. Wir blieben zwei Nächte in jedem B&B, was eine gute Gelegenheit bot, mehr über eine Stadt zu erfahren. Zusammenfassend: sehr gut organisiert, ausgewogen und wunderschöner Urlaub! (Übersetzt aus dem Englischen)
review_text_en: As a couple, we enjoyed a beautiful walking holiday organised by Cliff Wayenberg of Walking Holiday Ireland. The six days of walking in the Dundalk area, Carlingford and the Mourne Mountains were a good combination of different types of scenery, from easy walking to steep climbs. Walking distances each day were a bit longer and more difficult, giving a nice challenge every day. B&Bs located in towns with lots to see and to do in the evening, and all with very enthusiastic hosts. We stayed two nights in each B&B, giving a good opportunity to learn more about a city. In summary: very well organised, well balanced and beautiful holiday!

content: Op dag 1 geslapen in de B&B in Lordship en na een stevig Iers ontbijt een mooie wandeling gemaakt. Op de tweede dag een prachtige wandeling naar Carlingford, een prachtige plaats aan de kust met een B&B 'uit de kunst' en een perfecte plek voor een rondwandeling. Ook voor vertier en goed eten is gezorgd. We hebben er dan ook nog een dag aangeplakt. Samengevat: een prachtig land, ongelooflijk vriendelijke en beleefde mensen en een prima organisatie.
review_text_en: On day 1 stayed in the B&B in Lordship and after a hearty Irish breakfast made a lovely walk. On the second day a wonderful walk to Carlingford, a beautiful coastal town with an outstanding B&B and a perfect base for exploring. Entertainment and good food were also taken care of. We even added an extra day. In summary: a beautiful country, incredibly friendly and polite people, and excellent organisation.

title: We are already a few days at home and look back on a wonderful time in Northern
content: We are already a few days at home and look back on a wonderful time in Northern Ireland. The 500+ stunning photos have been downloaded (perhaps one of the reasons for our slow walking pace!). All B&Bs were excellent - good beds, nice breakfast, quiet location and very friendly and helpful hosts. It was very special to really meet no one on the Moyle Way. We had 2 wonderful meals in the Anzac restaurant in Ballycastle after two wonderful days walking. The combination of your descriptions and the maps worked perfectly. Only praise for the B&Bs in Cushendall and Portstewart - they were super cosy. The last walk to Portstewart was also brilliant. It was dry but very windy. Again, it was a great experience for us; the friendliness and helpfulness of everyone, including yourself, made a great impression on us.

We hadden 2 heerlijke maaltijden in het Anzac restaurant in Ballycastle na twee prachtige wandeldagen. De combinatie van jullie beschrijvingen en de kaarten werkte perfect. Alleen maar lof voor de B&B's in Cushendall en Portstewart - die waren super gezellig. De laatste wandeling naar Portstewart was ook fantastisch. Het was droog maar zeer winderig. Nogmaals, het was een geweldige ervaring voor ons; de vriendelijkheid en behulpzaamheid van iedereen, inclusief uzelf, maakten grote indruk op ons. (Vertaald uit het Engels)

title: De Wicklow Way was zeker de moeite waard
content: Het is alweer een tijdje geleden sinds juni 2024 dat we de Wicklow Way liepen. Het was zeker de moeite waard. De gemaakte afspraken werden goed nagekomen. De B&B's waren allemaal uitstekend, en de lokale taxichauffeurs waren zeer behulpzaam. Kortom, een geweldige ervaring. Kleine tip: twee keer moesten we van de route afwijken omdat coniferen werden gekapt. We lopen zonder GPS, en de wegwijzers waren verwijderd. (Vertaald uit het Engels)
constructive_feedback: Route waymarkers removed in areas where forestry felling was taking place.
whi_response: Cliff apologised, noted this is a periodic issue with managed Irish forests and announced the launch of a dedicated travel app.
review_text_en: It's been a while since June 2024 that we walked the Wicklow Way. It was definitely worth it. The agreements made were well fulfilled. The B&Bs were all excellent, and the local taxi drivers were very helpful. In short, an amazing experience. Small tip: twice, we were forced to deviate from the route because conifers were being cut down. We walk without GPS, and the signposts had been removed.

constructive_feedback: Route waymarkers removed in areas where forestry felling was taking place.
whi_response: Cliff apologised, noted this is a periodic issue with managed Irish forests and announced the launch of a dedicated travel app.
review_text_en: It's been a while since June 2024 that we walked the Wicklow Way. It was definitely worth it. The agreements made were well fulfilled. The B&Bs were all excellent, and the local taxi drivers were very helpful. In short, an amazing experience. Small tip: twice, we were forced to deviate from the route because conifers were being cut down. We walk without GPS, and the signposts had been removed.

title: Prachtige, pittige wandelvakantie gehad met partner
content: Prachtige, pittige wandelvakantie gehad met partner. De hotels/B&Bs waren super goed. Alles was goed geregeld en bij twijfel over het ophalen van de koffer, konden we snel even appen met Cliff. De bagage was goed geregeld. Helemaal top! Waarom geen 5 sterren: 1 accommodatie vonden wij wat minder, maar dat kan een ander weer een geweldige hostel vinden.
constructive_feedback: One accommodation felt below the standard of the others (subjective - reviewer acknowledges others may differ).
whi_response: Hallo Saskia, Bedankt voor je feedback en fijn om te horen dat je een fijne vakantie hebt gehad. Tot de volgende keer!
review_text_en: Had a beautiful, challenging walking holiday with my partner. The hotels/B&Bs were superb. Everything was well arranged, and when in doubt about luggage collection, we could quickly WhatsApp Cliff. Luggage was well handled. Absolutely top! Why not 5 stars: 1 accommodation we found less good, but someone else might love it.

title: Prachtige wandelroutes door de mooie natuur van Noord-Ierland
content: Prachtige wandelroutes door de mooie natuur van Noord-Ierland. Elke dag aankomen in, op 1 na, nette en schone B&B's en verwelkomd worden door allemaal zeer vriendelijke en behulpzame mensen. Zeer gastvrij en mooi land. (Vertaald uit het Engels)
constructive_feedback: One accommodation was below the standard of the others.
review_text_en: Beautiful walking routes through the beautiful nature of Northern Ireland. Arriving every day in, except for 1, neat and clean B&Bs and being welcomed by all very friendly and helpful people. Very hospitable and beautiful country.

title: Prachtige wandelvakantie
content: Prachtige wandelvakantie. Prima verzorgde reis met een prachtige wandelroute, welke prima is aangegeven. De algemene toelichting bij de tocht en in enkele gevallen de ligging en routes naar B&Bs is wel een verbeterpunt.
constructive_feedback: General walk notes and directions from the trail to individual B&B accommodations could be more detailed.
review_text_en: Beautiful walking holiday. Well-organised trip with a beautiful, well-marked walking route. The general walk notes and in some cases the directions to the B&B accommodations could be improved.

title: Die Reise war sehr schön
content: Die Reise war sehr schön. Positive Punkte sind, dass man in dieser Gegend wunderschöne Wanderungen machen kann. Schade, dass der Unterschied pro Tag so groß war. Wo man an einem Tag entlang atemberaubender Klippen wandert, wandert man am anderen Tag größtenteils entlang/über die Straße. Der Unterschied in der Entfernung ist auch groß - 20 km maximal, 13 km Minimum. (Übersetzt aus dem Englischen)
constructive_feedback: Large variation in daily distances (13-20 km) and terrain quality. One day along breathtaking cliffs, another day largely on road. Clearer day-by-day terrain previews when booking would help set expectations.
review_text_en: The trip was very nice. Positive points are that you can make beautiful walks in this area. Too bad that the difference per day was so great. Where one day you walk along breathtaking cliffs, the other day you walk for a large part along/over the road. The difference in distance is also large - 20 km max, 13 km minimum.

title: Prachtige reis in een prachtige omgeving
content: Prachtige reis in een prachtige omgeving. Alles prima geregeld, ook de transfers. De routebeschrijvingen naar de slaaplocaties hadden wel uitgebreider gemogen. Het is vervelend aan het eind van een lange wandeltocht nog te moeten zoeken naar de slaaplocatie. De laatste wandeldag was te lang, veel kilometers en veel stijgen en dalen.
constructive_feedback: Route descriptions to individual B&B accommodations need more detail. Final walking day felt too long with too much elevation change.
review_text_en: Beautiful trip in a beautiful environment. Everything well organised, including transfers. The route descriptions to the sleeping locations could have been more detailed - it is annoying to have to search for your accommodation at the end of a long day's walk. The last walking day was too long, with many kilometres and a lot of climbing and descending.

title: Erg genoten
content: Erg genoten. Prachtige omgeving, goed weer en fijne accommodaties. Behalve de laatste…
constructive_feedback: Last accommodation was below the standard of the others.
review_text_en: Really enjoyed it. Beautiful surroundings, good weather and nice accommodations. Except the last one…
